completion_promises.evidence: Implemented test_supersede_and_link_marks_predecessor and test_superseded_record_excluded_but_addressable in both unit and integration test suites. Unit tests verify mock store behavior, integration tests verify against real Postgres. All tests pass.
Implemented test_supersession_count_outline parametrized test with count=[0, 1, 5] in both unit and integration suites. All 6 parameterized tests pass (3 unit + 3 integration).

completion_promises.criterion_text: Forward-supersession case passes: write succeeds, link applied when the key later appears (ASSUM-008).
completion_promises.evidence: Implemented test_forward_supersession_applied_when_key_appears in unit tests and test_forward_supersession_with_real_store in integration tests. Tests verify successor can declare supersession of non-existent key, and when predecessor is later written, it is marked superseded. All tests pass.

Implemented test_cross_project_supersession in unit tests and test_cross_project_supersession_with_real_store in integration tests. Tests verify successor in one project can retire predecessor from another project's namespace. All tests pass.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Idempotent re-declaration case passes (superseded exactly once, no extra record).
completion_promises.evidence: Implemented test_idempotent_redeclaration in unit tests and test_idempotent_redeclaration_with_real_store in integration tests. Tests verify re-declaring same supersession keeps predecessor superseded exactly once. All tests pass.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Chain-collapse case passes: only C visible, chain to A traceable.
completion_promises.evidence: Implemented test_chain_collapse_traceable in unit tests and test_chain_collapse_traceable_with_real_store in integration tests. Tests verify chain A←B←C where only C is unsuperseded but full chain remains traceable. All tests pass.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Racing-successors case resolves to exactly one recorded successor.
completion_promises.evidence: Implemented test_racing_successors_resolve_to_one in unit tests and test_racing_successors_with_real_store in integration tests. Tests verify when two successors race for same predecessor, exactly one is recorded (last write wins). All tests pass.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Unit tests pass with no infrastructure; integration tests are gated behind @pytest.mark.integration and pass against the ephemeral Postgres fixture.
completion_promises.evidence: All unit tests use mock store (AsyncMock) requiring no infrastructure. All integration tests decorated with @pytest.mark.integration and use ephemeral_pg fixture. Unit tests: 10 passed. Integration tests: 10 passed with real Postgres+pgvector.
